creator: brooks@one-eyed-alien.net
text:
On Thu, Jan 24, 2002 at 04:08:51AM -0800, sheldonh@FreeBSD.ORG wrote:
> Synopsis: [PATCH] driver for arlan-655
>=20
> State-Changed-From-To: suspended->feedback
> State-Changed-By: sheldonh
> State-Changed-When: Thu Jan 24 04:06:30 PST 2002
> State-Changed-Why:=20
> Could you let us know whether FreeBSD's an(4) driver supports
> your hardware, and if not whether you have patches against it?

The products supported by an(4) and the arlan products are totally
unrelated except that they are wireless and were produced by the same
company.

-- Brooks

--=20
Any statement of the form "X is the one, true Y" is FALSE.
